# The Quarter

> A boutique coworking space in Canterbury's Cathedral Quarter, run by the Digital Tourism Think Tank (operated by SE1 Media Ltd). Warm, hospitality-grade workspace with natural light, breakfast, specialty coffee, fast fibre, meeting rooms and phone pods — a calm place to focus, and an escape from working at home.

## What it is
The Quarter is a members' co-working home above Canterbury's Cathedral Quarter. It offers open desks, two meeting rooms (The Knight's Tale, up to 8–10; The Chapter House, up to 4) and two phone pods (The Bell Tower, The Scriptorium), an events space (The Kentish Pantry), daily breakfast, specialty coffee and refreshments, plus a local rewards programme and neighbour-business perks. Open Monday to Friday, 08:00–18:00.

## Plans (prices include VAT)
- Day Pass — £21.60 for a single day (a day-pass carnet of 10 or 30 is also available).
- Visitor — £84/month for five days a month (annual option available).
- Resident — £138/month for ten days a month (annual option available).
- Citizen — £258/month, unrestricted access, priority room booking, a registered office address (annual option available).
- Hybrid Office — £42/month (billed annually): a Canterbury mailing address plus twelve co-working days a year.

## Location & contact
1st Floor, 27–28 Burgate, Canterbury, Kent, CT1 2HA, United Kingdom.
Website: https://thequarter.work · Enquiries via the website's "Talk to us" chat.
